advances.name: Rooms
advances.description: Crew clears the permanent 1 harm "tired" from their sheet.

advances.name: Locked doors
advances.description: Crew is no longer vulnerable while resting

advances.name: Poultices
advances.description: gain 4 ticks on your healing clock when you recover

advances.name: Stash
advances.description: 2 slots each for food and materials

advances.name: Large Stash
advances.description: 4 slots each for food and materials

advances.name: Training room
advances.description: The crew gains an xp trigger: You put your instructors' lessons into practice

advances.name: Holding chamber
advances.description: Secure place to hold one prisoner

advances.name: Meeting room
advances.description: +1 push when negotiating with hosted factions

advances.name: Common room
advances.description: Group rolls during downtime have push donation cost reduced to 1 stress

advances.name: Meetings
advances.description: +1 push to persuade or consort while in the community

advances.name: Giving back
advances.description: Members of the community perform a downtime action for the crew
